window_summary: This window tracks the recent metabase/metabase release stream across multiple minor versions and patch releases, including stable and beta artifacts. It covers releases from v0.54.24 through v0.61.2, showing a pattern of frequent patch updates and a new minor version beta.

chunks.title: Metabase 55.23
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: metabase/metabase
Release: Metabase 55.23
Tag: v0.55.23; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-04-09T23:03:54Z; created_at: 2026-04-08T18:34:57Z
Release notes:
## Upgrading
> Before you upgrade, back up your Metabase application database!
Check out our [upgrading instructions](https://metabase.com/docs/latest/operations-guide/upgrading-metabase).
[Get the most out of Metabase](https://www.metabase.com/pricing?utm_source=github&utm_medium=release-notes&utm_campaign=plan-comparison). Learn more about advanced features, managed cloud, and first-class support.
## Metabase Open Source
Docker image: [`metabase/metabase:v0.55.23.x`](https://hub.docker.com/r/metabase/metabase/tags)
JAR download: https://downloads.metabase.com/v0.55.23.x/metabase.jar
## Metabase Enterprise
Docker image: [`metabase/metabase-enterprise:v1.55.23.x`](https://hub.docker.com/r/metabase/metabase-enterprise/tags)
JAR download: https://downloads.metabase.com/enterprise/v1.55.23.x/metabase.jar
## Changelog
[Full Changelog](https://www.metabase.com/changelog/55#metabase-5523)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the metabase/metabase release Metabase 55.23 (tag v0.55.23), the release note provides standard upgrade instructions, Docker images, and JAR downloads for both Open Source and Enterprise editions, and links to the full changelog for version 55.

Metabase 60.1 provides only Open Source Docker images, while Metabase 61.1 provides only Enterprise JAR downloads.
